titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by Jasmine Larkin, 2019. Finding aid finalized by Kelly Besser, 2025.

p.date: Online finding aid last updated 2026 January 15.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-01-15 13:44:50 -0800.

did.unittitle: Barbara Schultz papers

physdesc.extent: (11 document boxes, 1 half document box, and 1 oversize folder)

did.abstract: Barbara Schultz (1927-2019) was a television producer and oversaw shows such as CBS Playhouse, PBS's Visions, and You Are There. Collection materials consist of scripts and production notes for the programs Schultz produced including CBS Playhouse and You Are There. Materials also include datebooks, address books, correspondence, photographs, and staging plans. The materials date from 1950 to 2006.
did.physloc: Stored off-site. All requests to access special collections material must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Open for research. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Reproduction and Use
userestrict.p: Copyright to portions of this collection has been assigned to the UCLA Library Special Collections. The library can grant permission to publish for materials to which it holds the copyright. All requests for permission to publish must be submitted in writing to Library Special Collections. Credit shall be given as follows: The Regents of the University of California on behalf of the UCLA Library Special Collections.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Barbara Schultz papers (LSC 2381). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Processed by Jasmine Larkin, 2019. The materials are arranged in the existing order in which they were received from the donor. Materials were placed in acid-free boxes and folders. Final processing by Kelly Besser, 2025.

Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's Library Collections and Archives.

bioghist.head: Biographical History
bioghist.p: Barbara Schultz (1927-2019) was a television producer and oversaw shows such as CBS Playhouse, PBS's Visions, and You Are There.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains materials related to the career of television producer, Barbara Schultz. Materials consist of scripts and production notes for the programs Schultz produced including CBS Playhouse and You Are There. Materials also include datebooks, address books, correspondence, photographs, and staging plans. The materials date from 1950 to 2006.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials were kept in their existing order.

controlaccess.subject: Television producers and directors -- United States
